// BatchDashboard.js import React from 'react'; const BatchDashboard = ({ dashboardData }) => { if (!dashboardData) { return (

No Batch Analysis Data Available

Please run a batch analysis first to see the results.

); } const { batchResult, timestamp } = dashboardData; return (

📊 Batch Processing Results

Analysis completed on {timestamp}

📄

Total Records

{batchResult.total_records}
⚠️

Churn Count

{batchResult.churn_count}
📊

Churn Rate

{(batchResult.churn_rate * 100).toFixed(1)}%

Analysis Summary

High-Risk Customers

{Math.round(batchResult.churn_count * 0.3)} customers need immediate attention

Retention Opportunity

{(batchResult.total_records - batchResult.churn_count)} customers are stable

Export Results

); }; export default BatchDashboard;
